name: pica-tutor
displayName: Pica — learn the code your AI writes
description: A pixel cat that rides along with your AI coding agent, explains the code it writes in designer language, and drills you until it sticks.

commands.title: Pica: Blank This File for Practice

pica.model.description: Optional model override for Pica's text (teaching, chat, games). Leave blank to use a smart default for your key's provider. If set, match it to your key: OpenRouter (author/model, e.g. nousresearch/hermes-4-70b or a ':free' model), Google Gemini (gemini-2.0-flash), Anthropic/Claude (claude-haiku-4-5, claude-sonnet-5, claude-opus-4-8), or OpenAI (gpt-4o-mini). A model that doesn't fit your key is ignored.

pica.visionModel.description: Optional vision-model override for analysing attached screenshots. Leave blank to auto-pick per provider (Gemini/OpenAI models see images directly; on OpenRouter, Pica uses a free vision model since Hermes is text-only).

pica.agentName.description: The coding agent Pica narrates, e.g. 'Claude Code', 'Cursor', 'Hermes'. Leave blank to auto-detect from the workspace (falls back to 'your agent').
